# Bytes.UIntBE method

Read a big-endian unsigned integer of *n* bytes (1..8). CASC local-index location fields are packed big-endian across an odd number of bytes.

```csharp
public static ulong UIntBE(ReadOnlySpan<byte> b, int o, int n)
```
